texto: if you try you might succeed. If you don't try you won't succeed. On motor bike racing it goes= if you fall off and get back up you might win. if you stay lying down you won't win. Keep trying
explicacao: Citação de Warren Fox sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “if you try you might succeed. If you don't try you won't succeed. On motor bike racing it goes= i…” articula reflexao, self-improvement, might em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
